method_summary: AIBuildAI-2 is a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, hierarchical knowledge system that dynamically loads relevant context for AI model building, initialized with web-collected AI development documents and continually evolving through distilled experience from completed tasks.
key_innovation: an external, evolving knowledge system that dynamically loads relevant context for AI model building, initialized with web-collected AI development documents and continually evolving through distilled experience from completed tasks
best_result: First place on MLE-Bench with a 70.7% medal rate
limitations_stated: The performance of AI agents is limited by the static, often outdated, and sparse parametric knowledge of their underlying large language models, particularly on practical AI model engineering know-how
compute_required: Not specified in the provided text
title: AIBuildAI-2: Scalable Agentic AI Research and Engineering
